data.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute experts Conner Brown and Zach Shapiro spoke at the UN on digital asset law.
data.description: In a noteworthy development, the Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI) engaged in a significant meeting at the United Nations Headquarters in New York on Feb. 12, 2026. BPI representatives, Conner Brown and Zach Shapiro, took part in a momentous session at the UNCITRAL Colloquium on Digital Trade and Finance. The event, held by the United Nations, showcased expertise from the BPI on key issues related to digital trade and finance.

data.title: Fastly stock surges 88% on record Q4 revenue of $172.6 million, EPS doubling expectations, driven by rise in agentic AI.
data.description: Fastly Inc. (NYSE: FSLY) saw its shares skyrocket by over 80% following the release of its fourth-quarter results and bullish 2026 outlook. The company reported a record-breaking quarterly revenue of $172.6 million, representing a 23% increase from the previous year. Earnings per share also surpassed analysts' expectations, doubling forecasts. CEO Kip Compton hailed this as a pivotal moment for the edge cloud platform, referring to it as a significant "inflection point." Fastly's stock is on a sharp upward trajectory. The company's role as a leading player in facilitating agentic AI, which includes autonomous models and bots operating on the web independently, has been a key driver behind the investor excitement. Compton emphasized the growing significance of such traffic, highlighting a fundamental shift in the operations of the internet. This development underscores Fastly's growing prominence as a key enabler in the realm of autonomous AI.

data.title: Titomic Limited signs Space Act Agreement with NASA for testing and evaluation. Global leader in cold spray additive manufacturing.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Huntsville, Alabama, Titomic Limited (ASX: TTT), a prominent player in cold spray additive manufacturing through its Titomic Kinetic Fusion™ technology, revealed a significant development. The company has entered a Space Act Agreement with NASA for collaborative testing and evaluation purposes. This agreement marks a strategic move for Titomic Limited to advance its technology further through partnership with a leading space agency.

data.title: Noise-PR aids 350+ US real estate agents in boosting business by enhancing their brand visibility and positioning.
data.description: In London on February 12, 2026, Noise-PR, a boutique agency specializing in public relations and brand authority, has supported over 350 real estate agents throughout the United States. This assistance has enabled these agents to enhance their visibility and attract more inbound demand by strategically positioning them through trusted national publicity efforts.

data.title: Trax Ltd. divests Image Recognition business to Gemspring Capital, focusing on growth; strategically positioning for market expansion.
data.description: In Boston on February 12, 2026, Trax Ltd., a tech company known for its data-driven AI in retail and image recognition expertise, revealed the sale of its Image Recognition (IR) division to a Gemspring Capital affiliate. This move signifies a strategic shift in focus, emphasizing the importance of investing in other core areas within the company.

data.title: Sysco Teamsters in Chicago and Montana authorize strike as over 500 workers demand fair contract with 99.5% vote margin.
data.description: In a show of solidarity, a group of over 500 Sysco drivers and warehouse workers in Chicago and Montana, represented by five Teamsters locals, have overwhelmingly voted by a 99.5 percent margin to approve a strike. This decision comes amidst demands for a fair contract.

data.title: SportsMed Physical Therapy opens clinic in Emerson, expanding to 52 clinics in NJ and CT, with headquarters in Ridgewood, N.J.
data.description: SportsMed Physical Therapy has recently opened a new clinic in Emerson, further expanding their presence to a total of 52 clinics across New Jersey and Connecticut. The news was released on February 12, 2026, by SportsMed Physical Therapy through PR Newswire. The dateline location for the announcement should be noted as "RIDGEWOOD, N.J." instead of the previously mentioned location.

data.title: NIH halts low-dose rivaroxaban arm in stroke trial due to safety review findings in Phase 3 CAPTIVA trial.
data.description: The National Institutes of Health (NIH) has discontinued the low-dose rivaroxaban arm of its Phase 3 CAPTIVA stroke prevention trial. The trial aimed to compare the efficacy of experimental arms (rivaroxaban or ticagrelor, or both) against clopidogrel in reducing the 1-year rate of ischemic stroke, intracerebral hemorrhage, or vascular death. The decision came after an independent safety review revealed increased safety events and a lack of potential benefits. The NIH's National Institute of Neurological Disorders and Stroke, which sponsors the trial, acted on the recommendation of the Data Safety and Monitoring Board to halt the rivaroxaban group due to safety concerns and a predetermined futility threshold. Rivaroxaban is a product of Bayer AG and Johnson & Johnson. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Progyny, Inc. (Nasdaq: PGNY) to report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Progyny, Inc. (Nasdaq: PGNY), a prominent company specializing in women's health and family building services, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluded on December 31, 2025, post the market closing on Thursday, February 26, 2026.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services facilitated the sale of Martin Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram in Cleveland, Texas from Brian Bounds to Kedge Cook on Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: Leading dealership buy-sell operations company, Performance Brokerage Services, disclosed the transfer of ownership of Martin Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram in Cleveland, Texas. Brian Bounds sold the dealership to Kedge Cook. The transaction took place in Cleveland, Texas. The announcement was made from Irvine, California on February 12, 2026. Performance Brokerage Services is known for handling a significant volume of dealership buy-sell activities in North America.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services facilitated sale of Columbiana Ford in Ohio from Pillar Automotive to Prestige Auto Group.
data.description: In Irvine, California on February 12, 2026, Performance Brokerage Services, the leading dealership brokerage firm in North America, revealed the successful acquisition of Columbiana Ford in Columbiana, Ohio. The dealership was purchased from Pillar Automotive by Prestige Auto Group. Columbiana Ford, a prominent establishment, has been transferred to new ownership as part of this transaction. The sale marks a significant milestone for both parties involved and underscores the active nature of the automotive industry.

data.title: Jim Henson's Labyrinth celebrates 40 years with consumer products lineup; original film starred David Bowie and Jennifer Connelly.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 12, 2026, it was announced that it is the 40th anniversary of the release of the famous fantasy musical film "Labyrinth," which starred David Bowie as Jareth the Goblin King and Jennifer Connelly as Sarah. The film has since achieved legendary status.

data.title: SQDC's Q3 of fiscal 2025-26: $43.6M comprehensive income, $82.3M tax revenues, $58.5M to QC, $23.8M to federal.
data.description: In its 2025-2026 fiscal year, the Société québécoise du cannabis (SQDC) reported $43.6 million in comprehensive income for the third quarter ending on January 3, 2026, up from $40.5 million in the same period the previous year. Additionally, the SQDC's operations generated $82.3 million in tax revenues, with $58.5 million going to the Québec government and $23.8 million to the federal government. The net income and Québec's portion of the excise tax are fully remitted to the Ministre des Finances du Québec for reinvestment, primarily in cannabis-related prevention efforts.

data.title: Baxter Intl Q4 earnings missed estimates by -16.98%, with EPS at $0.44 instead of $0.53. Revenue increased by $221 million.
data.description: Baxter Intl (NYSE: BAX) recently announced its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 12, 2026 at 07:15 AM. The earnings report revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -16.98%, reporting an EPS of $0.44 compared to the estimated $0.53. Revenue showed an increase of $221.00 million from the previous year. In the prior quarter, Baxter Intl exceeded EPS expectations by $0.09, leading to a 3.6% decrease in... A comprehensive analysis can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Over 200 US Foods workers in Indiana, represented by Teamsters Local 135, ratify new contract after strike threat.
data.description: In Fishers, Indiana, on February 12, 2026, over 200 drivers and warehouse workers at US Foods, who are members of Teamsters Local 135, have successfully negotiated a favorable agreement after presenting a significant strike threat. The agreement has been widely supported by the workers, ensuring better terms and conditions for their work. This resolution marks a significant win for the employees, solidifying their position in the company.

data.title: XRP surges 9% in a week, Evernorth to integrate XLS-66 for yield opportunities, Goldman Sachs accounts for 14% of ETF inflows.
data.description: XRP has seen a 9% increase in value in the last week, surpassing much of the overall cryptocurrency market. This rise is attributed to positive institutional advancements and ecosystem enhancements that have bolstered investor confidence. Evernorth has disclosed plans to utilize the XRP Lending Protocol (XLS-66) to enhance its digital asset strategy. This move is aimed at providing profitable opportunities for institutional XRP investors. While XRP has mainly been utilized for transactions and international payments, it has lacked a built-in yield-generating system for dormant holdings. The proposed lending protocol, through Single-Asset Vaults (SAVs), aims to fill this void by allowing holders to deposit XRP. Find more details on this development on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trustline Advisory Group introduces AI Reputation & Visibility Service to aid companies in enhancing AI search presence.
data.description: A new advisory service focused on AI Reputation and Visibility has been introduced by Trustline Advisory Group in London on Feb. 12, 2026. This initiative is designed to assist companies in enhancing their representation on AI-driven search platforms and prominent language models. The advisory aims to improve companies' visibility and reputation in the digital realm, catering to the evolving strategies required in the technological landscape. This introduction signifies a shift towards addressing the significance of AI in online presence management.

data.title: UT Health San Antonio receives $5 million donation from Bill and Rebecca Reed for Biggs Institute targeting dementia.
data.description: UT Health San Antonio has received a generous donation of $5 million from Bill and Rebecca Reed to enhance the Glenn Biggs Institute for Alzheimer's. The funds will be used to further research, therapies, and care for dementia. This contribution signifies a significant step towards combatting Alzheimer's and related diseases.
